Meet Sydney

Hi, I'm
Sydney.

I'm a small-town Canadian and the proud owner of SG Esthetics, where I help clients feel confident and put together in a way that feels natural to them. I take pride in my work and in creating an experience that's both comfortable and detail-focused.

At 22, I'm still growing — but focused on building a salon that reflects my standards and my style.

Owner & Esthetician

Sydney
Gunther

Hi, I'm Sydney — a small-town Canadian and the owner of SG Esthetics, where I focus on helping clients feel confident and put together in a way that feels natural to them. I take a lot of pride in my work and in creating an experience that's both comfortable and detail-focused.

I'm very driven and always looking to improve, whether that's refining my skills or staying up to date with what's happening in the industry. I genuinely enjoy what I do, and that's a big part of why I've created a salon where clients feel confident, comfortable, and taken care of.

Outside of work, I'm pretty balanced. I enjoy being at home, but I also love to travel when I get the chance. I'm a dog mom, I appreciate the small details, and I've always had an eye for clean, well-done brows.

At 22, I'm still growing — but I'm focused on continuing to build a business that reflects my standards and my style.

Salon Owner22 Years Young Dog MomSmall Town Canada Always LearningAutumn Lover WorkaholicInterior Health Approved

Services &
Pricing

Prices do not include GST

01 — Lash

Lash
Services

Prices do not include GST

$25

Lash Tint

A semi-permanent treatment that tints your natural eyelashes a darker colour. Suitable for those with fair or blonde lashes.

Lasts 4–6 weeks

$110

Lash Lift & Tint

A low-maintenance treatment that perms and darkens your natural eyelashes, making them look longer and more defined without extensions or mascara. The lift curls lashes upward from the base while the tint adds a dark colour.

Lasts 4–8 weeks

02 — Brow

Brow
Services

Prices do not include GST

$20

Brow Tint

Adds colour & depth to brow hairs. Ideal for anyone looking to enhance their natural brows with a low-maintenance option, especially those with blonde or grey brow hair.

Lasts 3–5 weeks on hairs

$40

Brow Wax & Tint

Brows are tinted to add colour, then waxed using a gentle hypoallergenic hard wax to remove unwanted hairs and create a clean, flattering shape.

$45

Brow Sculpt

Brow shape is mapped out, then a specialized dye is applied that colours both the brow hairs and the skin underneath, creating a fuller, more defined, makeup-like look. Followed by a wax. Ideal for achieving sleek, bold, more defined brows.

Stains skin up to 1 week  ·  Hairs up to 7 weeks

$80

Brow Lamination

Eyebrow hairs are restructured by smoothing & taming them. Allows for more styling flexibility to make them appear fuller, thicker, or more uniform and hold their shape better. Includes wax & tint / dye.

Lasts 4–6 weeks

03 — Wax

Wax
Services

Prices do not include GST

$40

Bikini

Removes hair visible outside a bathing suit or underwear line.

$50

Bikini Plus

AKA "French Bikini". More than a standard bikini wax, but less than a Brazilian. Removes hair from outside the bikini line and further in from the sides. Leaves a strip or triangle in the front, doesn't remove any hair from the back.

$65

Brazilian

Removes all hair from the front, back, and between the buttocks — a small strip or triangle can be left. Uses hypoallergenic wax for the most quick, seamless & comfortable experience. Suitable for all skin types including highly sensitive skin.

Additional Wax Services

Underarm$20
Lip / Chin / Cheek$10 ea.
Half Leg$55
Eyebrow$20
Full Leg$70
Full Face$45
Belly Strip$10

04 — PMU

PMU
Services

Prices do not include GST

$350

Microblading

A semi-permanent cosmetic tattooing technique using a manual handheld tool with tiny needles to create realistic, hair-like strokes in the eyebrow area. Deposits pigment into the upper layer of the skin to simulate natural eyebrow hairs, resulting in a fuller, more defined, low-maintenance brow shape.

Follow-up appointment required 4–6 weeks after first appointment — $125

$365

Powder Brows

Creates a soft, shaded, filled-in look using a specialized machine to deposit tiny, pixelated dots of pigment into the upper layers of the skin. Results in a natural-looking, defined eyebrow shape — similar to wearing brow makeup every day.

Follow-up appointment required 4–6 weeks after first appointment — $125

$400

Combo Brows

AKA hybrid brows — blends natural hair strokes at the front with powder shading throughout the middle & tail, for a fuller & more defined yet realistic look. Combines the best of both techniques for enhanced depth and coverage.

Follow-up appointment required 4–6 weeks after first appointment — $125

$200

Refresher

Maintenance sessions to restore the colour, intensity, definition, and shape of cosmetic tattoos that have naturally faded over time. Recommended every 2–3 years for existing clients.

Timing varies based on lifestyle, skin type, PMU type and desired look

Post-Service Care

Aftercare
Instructions

Waxing Aftercare Instructions

⏱

Keep Area Clean & Calm

Keep the waxed area clean, and avoid heat and friction during the first 24–48 hours.

❌

No Skincare Treatments

Do not undertake any skincare treatments 48 hours before or after getting a wax.

🚺

No Sauna or Steam

No sauna, hot tubs, or steam treatments for 24 hours.

🚿

No Hot Showers or Baths

No hot showers or baths for 24 hours after your wax.

👗

Wear Loose Clothing

Wear clean, loose fitting clothes to prevent irritation on the treated area.

🏄

No Working Out or Swimming

Avoid working out or swimming the day of your wax.

☀

No Tanning

No tanning (sunbathing, sun beds or fake tans) for 48 hours.

✨

Exfoliate & Moisturize

Exfoliate + moisturize 2–3 times a week to avoid ingrown hairs.

Lash aftercare instructions coming soon.

In the meantime, please contact Sydney directly for post-service care guidance.

Questions

FAQ

Is Microblading suitable for oily skin?+

Microblading is not ideal for oily skin as excess oil can blur the hair strokes over time. Powder Brows or Combo Brows are better suited. Chat with Sydney during your consultation to determine the best option for you.

How long does PMU last?+

PMU typically lasts 1–3 years depending on your skin type, lifestyle, sun exposure, and the technique used. A refresher appointment every 2–3 years is recommended to maintain colour and shape.

Are prices tax-inclusive?+

No — all listed prices do not include GST. GST will be added at the time of your appointment.

What should I do to prepare for a brow or PMU appointment?+

Arrive with clean skin and no makeup in the brow area. For PMU, avoid alcohol, blood thinners, and sun exposure 24–48 hours before. Do not tweeze or wax brows for at least 2 weeks prior to your appointment.

How long should hair be for waxing?+

Hair should be at least 1/4 inch long (about 3–4 weeks of growth) for best results. If hair is too short, the wax may not grip effectively.

Do you do online booking?+

No — I don't use online booking. To book, please text or call 250-442-7850, or send a DM on Instagram (@sg.esthetics.salon) or Facebook (Lash.by.Sydney). I prefer texting!

Handpicked by Sydney

Retail &
Products

Every product I carry is something I personally use and believe in. I only recommend what I know works to protect and extend your results.

✦

Lash Serum

A nourishing serum applied nightly to the lash line to condition, strengthen, and encourage natural lash growth. Gentle enough for sensitive eyes.

Why I carry it: Healthy natural lashes mean better lift results and longer-lasting tints. A good serum is the foundation of great lash services.

◇

Silk Pillowcases

Genuine silk pillowcases that reduce friction against your lashes and brows while you sleep. Unlike cotton, silk doesn't absorb moisture or cause creasing overnight.

Why I carry it: Sleeping on silk significantly extends the life of lash lifts, brow laminations, and PMU by reducing overnight friction and damage.

❖

Exfoliating Scrub

A gentle yet effective scrub formulated to prep and maintain skin around the brow area. Removes dead skin cells so pigment adheres evenly and heals beautifully.

Why I carry it: Regular exfoliation keeps your PMU looking fresh and vibrant for longer. It's one of the most underrated steps in aftercare.

✷

Lash Shampoo

An oil-free lash cleanser that gently removes makeup, buildup, and debris from the lash line without compromising lash health or service results.

Why I carry it: Clean lashes = healthy lashes. Using the right lash shampoo extends your lift and tint and prevents irritation or infection.

The Perfect Gift

SG Esthetics
Gift Cards

Treat someone you love to a luxury beauty experience. SG Esthetics gift cards can be used toward any service — lash, brow, waxing, or PMU. Available in any amount. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or just because.

No Online Booking

How to
Book

I prefer keeping things personal. No app, no online form — just a quick text, call, or DM and we'll get you booked!

📱

Text or Call

The preferred method! Send a text or give me a call. I'll get back to you as soon as possible to confirm your appointment.

250-442-7850
📸

Instagram DM

Slide into my DMs on Instagram! I check messages regularly and love connecting with clients this way too.

@sg.esthetics.salon
👍

Facebook

You can also reach me through Facebook Messenger. I'll confirm your booking details with you directly.

Lash.by.Sydney
🚫

No Online Booking

I don't use an online booking system. All appointments are confirmed personally by me to ensure the best experience possible.

Please Read

Cancellation
Policy

Cancellations & Rescheduling

Life happens — I completely understand. However, as a small business, last-minute cancellations and no-shows have a significant impact on my schedule and income. I ask that you please give as much notice as possible if you need to cancel or reschedule.

To make any changes, please contact me directly by text at 250-442-7850, or via Instagram or Facebook DM. Please do not leave a voicemail — a text is the best way to reach me.

Late Arrivals

If you're running late, please let me know as soon as possible. Arriving more than 15 minutes late may result in your appointment needing to be rescheduled, as it can impact the quality of your service and the appointments of other clients.

PMU Appointments

Due to the nature of permanent makeup services and the preparation time required, PMU cancellations require extra notice. Please reach out as early as possible if anything changes.

Frequently Asked

FAQ

How do I book an appointment?+

Text or call 250-442-7850, or DM on Instagram (@sg.esthetics.salon) or Facebook (Lash.by.Sydney). I prefer texting! I do not use online booking.

How far in advance should I book?+

At least 1–2 weeks in advance for regular services and 2–4 weeks for PMU. Popular time slots fill up quickly!

Do you require a deposit?+

Please contact me at 250-442-7850 for deposit information. PMU appointments may require a deposit to secure the booking.

Can I bring someone to my appointment?+

To maintain a calm and focused environment, I ask that guests do not accompany clients during appointments unless absolutely necessary. Please reach out if you have special circumstances.

What if I need to cancel last minute?+

Please contact me as soon as possible by text at 250-442-7850. I understand life happens, but last-minute cancellations significantly impact a small business. I appreciate as much notice as you can give.

What forms of payment do you accept?+

Please reach out to confirm accepted payment methods. Text me at 250-442-7850 with any questions before your appointment.
